API docs by Redocly

Lythaus (formerly Asora) API (v3)

Download OpenAPI specification:

License: MIT

HTTP contract for Lythaus (formerly Asora) Functions v1.

Feed

Feed retrieval endpoints.

Retrieve personalized feed items

Return a page of feed items.

Authorizations:
NonebearerAuth
query Parameters
cursor
string
Example: cursor=eyJsYXN0SWQiOiIwMThiMjdkNC01YjNiLTczZTMtYmY3Ny1iZjdiYjk1MzBmMjEiLCJ0cyI6MTcxNDQ3ODQwMH0

Opaque pagination cursor returned in the previous response's meta.nextCursor

limit
integer [ 1 .. 50 ]
Default: 25
Example: limit=25

Maximum number of items to return per page

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/feed

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 429
Content type
application/json
{
  • "success": true,
  • "data": {
    • "items": [
      • {
        • "id": "018b27d4-5b3b-73e3-bf77-bf7bb9530f21",
        • "text": "Hello Lythaus!",
        • "authorId": "usr_01HZPQ2B3C4D5E6F7G8H9JABCD",
        • "createdAt": "2026-04-30T10:00:00Z"
        }
      ],
    • "meta": {
      • "count": 1,
      • "nextCursor": "eyJsYXN0SWQiOiIwMThiMjdkNC01YjNiLTczZTMtYmY3Ny1iZjdiYjk1MzBmMjEiLCJ0cyI6MTcxNDQ3ODQwMH0"
      }
    },
  • "timestamp": "2026-04-30T10:00:00Z"
}

Return discovery/explore feed

Authorizations:
bearerAuth

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/feed/discover

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{ }

Return News Board feed

Return authenticated News Board posts. Free receives a maximum three-item preview with no cursor; Premium and Black receive the full board. Admin is an authorization role, not a commercial tier. Publishing remains restricted to editorial contributors and approved ingestion paths.

Authorizations:
NonebearerAuth
query Parameters
cursor
string
Example: cursor=eyJsYXN0SWQiOiIwMThiMjdkNC01YjNiLTczZTMtYmY3Ny1iZjdiYjk1MzBmMjEiLCJ0cyI6MTcxNDQ3ODQwMH0

Opaque pagination cursor returned in the previous response's meta.nextCursor

limit
integer [ 1 .. 50 ]
Default: 25
Example: limit=25

Maximum number of items to return per page

region
string

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/feed/news

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "items": [
    • {
      • "id": "string",
      • "authorId": "string",
      • "content": "string",
      • "contentType": "text",
      • "mediaUrls": [
        • "http://example.com"
        ],
      • "topics": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "visibility": "public",
      • "isNews": true,
      • "source": {
        • "type": "journalist",
        • "name": "string",
        • "url": "http://example.com",
        • "feedUrl": "http://example.com",
        • "externalId": "string",
        • "publishedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
        • "ingestedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
        • "ingestedBy": "string",
        • "ingestMethod": "admin_api"
        },
      • "clusterId": "string",
      • "authorship": {
        • "authorshipLabel": "Human-authored",
        • "declaredAuthorship": "human",
        • "classificationSource": "user_disclosure",
        • "classificationState": "confirmed",
        • "reviewState": "not_required",
        • "appealState": "none",
        • "labelVersion": "string",
        • "classifiedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
        • "reviewedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
        },
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "author": { },
      • "authorRole": "journalist",
      • "likeCount": 0,
      • "commentCount": 0,
      • "bookmarkCount": 0,
      • "viewCount": 0,
      • "viewerHasLiked": true,
      • "viewerHasBookmarked": true,
      • "viewerFollowsAuthor": true,
      • "authorFollowerCount": 0,
      • "recentComments": [
        • {
          • "commentId": "string",
          • "authorId": "string",
          • "text": "string",
          • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
          }
        ],
      • "badges": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "trustStatus": "verified_signals_attached",
      • "timeline": {
        • "created": "complete",
        • "mediaChecked": "complete",
        • "moderation": "complete",
        • "appeal": "open"
        },
      • "hasAppeal": true,
      • "proofSignalsProvided": true,
      • "verifiedContextBadgeEligible": true,
      • "featuredEligible": true
      }
    ],
  • "nextCursor": "string",
  • "accessLevel": "preview",
  • "locked": true,
  • "previewLimit": 1
}

Return a public user's post feed

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
userId
required
string

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/feed/user/{userId}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{ }

Retrieve public discovery feed

Public feed surface using ranking safety filters and reputation-derived trust weighting without paid-tier boosting.

query Parameters
cursor
string
Example: cursor=eyJsYXN0SWQiOiIwMThiMjdkNC01YjNiLTczZTMtYmY3Ny1iZjdiYjk1MzBmMjEiLCJ0cyI6MTcxNDQ3ODQwMH0

Opaque pagination cursor returned in the previous response's meta.nextCursor

limit
integer [ 1 .. 50 ]
Default: 25
Example: limit=25

Maximum number of items to return per page

includeTopics
string
excludeTopics
string

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/feed/public

Response samples

  • 200
  • 429
Content type
application/json
{
  • "items": [
    • { }
    ],
  • "meta": {
    • "count": 0,
    • "nextCursor": "eyJsYXN0SWQiOiIwMThiMjdkNC01YjNiLTczZTMtYmY3Ny1iZjdiYjk1MzBmMjEiLCJ0cyI6MTcxNDQ3ODQwMH0",
    • "timingsMs": {
      • "property1": 0,
      • "property2": 0
      },
    • "applied": { }
    }
}

Health

Liveness monitoring endpoints.

Service health probe

Liveness/readiness check. No auth.

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/health

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 429
  • 502
  • 503
Content type
application/json
{
  • "ok": true,
  • "status": "string",
  • "timestamp": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "service": "string",
  • "version": "string"
}

Readiness probe

Authorizations:
bearerAuth

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/ready

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{ }

Auth

Authentication and invite access endpoints.

Validate an invite code

Validates an invite code without revealing status details.

query Parameters
code
string

Invite code (format XXXX-XXXX)

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/auth/invite/validate

Response samples

  • 200
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "success": true,
  • "data": {
    • "valid": true
    },
  • "timestamp": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "requestId": "string"
}

Issue OAuth2 tokens

Exchange an authorization code or refresh token for an access token and refresh token. Implements OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code with PKCE (RFC 7636) and Refresh Token grants.

Request Body schema: application/json
required
grant_type
required
string
Enum: "authorization_code" "refresh_token"

Grant type

client_id
required
string

Registered client identifier

code
string

Authorization code (required for authorization_code grant)

redirect_uri
string <uri>

Must match the redirect URI used during authorization

code_verifier
string

PKCE code verifier (required when code_challenge was provided)

refresh_token
string

Refresh token (required for refresh_token grant)

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/auth/token

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
Example
{
  • "grant_type": "authorization_code",
  • "client_id": "asora-mobile",
  • "code": "SplxlOBeZQQYbYS6WxSbIA",
  • "redirect_uri": "com.asora.app://callback",
  • "code_verifier": "dBjftJeZ4CVP-mB92K27uhbUJU1p1r_wW1gFWFOEjXk"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 429
Content type
application/json
{
  • "success": true,
  • "data": {
    • "access_token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...",
    • "refresh_token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...",
    • "token_type": "Bearer",
    • "expires_in": 900
    },
  • "timestamp": "2026-04-30T12:00:00Z"
}

OAuth2 authorization endpoint

Initiates the OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code flow. On success, issues a 302 redirect to the redirect_uri with an authorization code and the state parameter echoed back.

query Parameters
response_type
required
string
Value: "code"
client_id
required
string
redirect_uri
required
string <uri>
state
string
code_challenge
string

PKCE code challenge (S256 method required)

code_challenge_method
string
Value: "S256"
scope
string
Example: scope=openid profile email

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/auth/authorize

Response samples

  • 400
  • 429
Content type
application/json
{
  • "error": {
    • "code": "VALIDATION_FAILED",
    • "message": "Request validation failed",
    • "correlationId": "string",
    • "fields": [
      • {
        • "field": "text",
        • "message": "Field is required",
        • "constraint": "minLength"
        }
      ]
    }
}

OIDC UserInfo endpoint

Returns claims about the authenticated user per OpenID Connect Core 1.0.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/auth/userinfo

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 429
Content type
application/json
{
  • "success": true,
  • "data": {
    • "sub": "usr_01HZPQ2B3C4D5E6F7G8H9JABCD",
    • "email": "alice@example.com",
    • "displayName": "Alice Example",
    • "handle": "alice",
    • "tier": "free",
    • "roles": [
      • "user"
      ]
    },
  • "timestamp": "2026-04-30T12:00:00Z"
}

OIDC UserInfo endpoint (POST)

POST variant of the UserInfo endpoint for clients that cannot use query strings.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/x-www-form-urlencoded
optional
object

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/auth/userinfo

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 429
Content type
application/json
{
  • "success": true,
  • "data": {
    • "sub": "usr_01HZPQ2B3C4D5E6F7G8H9JABCD",
    • "email": "alice@example.com",
    • "displayName": "Alice Example",
    • "handle": "alice",
    • "tier": "free",
    • "roles": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "avatarUrl": "http://example.com"
    },
  • "timestamp": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Redeem an invite code to activate account

Allows an authenticated but inactive user to redeem a valid invite code. On success the user is activated and a fresh token pair is returned.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
inviteCode
required
string^[A-Z0-9]{4}-[A-Z0-9]{4}$

Invite code in XXXX-XXXX format

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/auth/redeem-invite

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "inviteCode": "ABCD-1234"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 409
  • 429
Content type
application/json
{
  • "success": true,
  • "data": {
    • "access_token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...",
    • "refresh_token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...",
    • "token_type": "Bearer",
    • "expires_in": 900,
    • "activated": true
    },
  • "timestamp": "2026-04-30T12:00:00Z"
}

Authorizations:
bearerAuth

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/auth/ping

  • 403
Content type
application/json
{ }

Posts

Post authoring endpoints.

Create a new post

Create a new post.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
text
required
string <= 5000 characters

Post body text

mediaUrl
string or null <uri>
aiLabel
required
string
Enum: "human" "assisted" "generated"

Required authorship disclosure.

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/post

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "text": "Launch checklist is locked and ready for review.",
  • "aiLabel": "human"
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 429
Content type
application/json
{
  • "status": "success",
  • "post": {
    • "postId": "018b27d4-7f9b-7d9e-bf0e-9bf93c3fce43",
    • "text": "Launch checklist is locked and ready for review.",
    • "mediaUrl": null,
    • "authorId": "usr_01HZPQ2B3C4D5E6F7G8H9JABCD",
    • "createdAt": "2026-07-10T12:00:00Z",
    • "updatedAt": "2026-07-10T12:00:00Z",
    • "stats": {
      • "likes": 0,
      • "comments": 0,
      • "replies": 0
      },
    • "authorship": {
      • "authorshipLabel": "Human-authored",
      • "declaredAuthorship": "human",
      • "classificationSource": "user_disclosure",
      • "classificationState": "confirmed",
      • "reviewState": "not_required",
      • "appealState": "none",
      • "labelVersion": "alpha-2026-07-v1"
      }
    }
}

Create a post with moderation and AI authenticity checks

Create a post for the authenticated user. An authorship disclosure is required. Disclosed AI-assisted and AI-generated content may be published with categorical labels; conflicts or unavailable classification enter review. Prohibited content remains blocked regardless of authorship.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
content
required
string
contentType
required
string
Enum: "text" "image" "video" "mixed"
mediaUrls
Array of strings <uri> [ items <uri > ]
topics
Array of strings
visibility
string
Enum: "public" "followers" "private"
isNews
boolean
aiLabel
required
string
Enum: "human" "assisted" "generated"

Required user authorship disclosure. Public responses use categorical labels only.

object (PostProofSignals)

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/posts

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "content": "string",
  • "contentType": "text",
  • "mediaUrls": [
    • "http://example.com"
    ],
  • "topics": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "visibility": "public",
  • "isNews": true,
  • "aiLabel": "human",
  • "proofSignals": {
    • "captureMetadataHash": "string",
    • "editHistoryHash": "string",
    • "sourceAttestationUrl": "http://example.com"
    }
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 429
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "string",
  • "authorId": "string",
  • "content": "string",
  • "contentType": "text",
  • "mediaUrls": [
    • "http://example.com"
    ],
  • "topics": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "visibility": "public",
  • "isNews": true,
  • "source": {
    • "type": "journalist",
    • "name": "string",
    • "url": "http://example.com",
    • "feedUrl": "http://example.com",
    • "externalId": "string",
    • "publishedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "ingestedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "ingestedBy": "string",
    • "ingestMethod": "admin_api"
    },
  • "clusterId": "string",
  • "authorship": {
    • "authorshipLabel": "Human-authored",
    • "declaredAuthorship": "human",
    • "classificationSource": "user_disclosure",
    • "classificationState": "confirmed",
    • "reviewState": "not_required",
    • "appealState": "none",
    • "labelVersion": "string",
    • "classifiedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "reviewedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    },
  • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Get a post by ID

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/posts/{id}

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "string",
  • "authorId": "string",
  • "content": "string",

    • "http://example.com"

    },

    • "appealState": "none",

    • "reviewedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
    },
  • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "author": { },
  • "authorRole": "journalist",
  • "likeCount": 0,
  • "commentCount": 0,
  • "bookmarkCount": 0,
  • "viewCount": 0,
  • "viewerHasLiked": true,
  • "viewerHasBookmarked": true,
  • "viewerFollowsAuthor": true,
  • "authorFollowerCount": 0,

    • {
      • "commentId": "string",

      }
    ],

    • "string"

  • "timeline": {
    • "created": "complete",
    • "mediaChecked": "complete",
    • "moderation": "complete",
    • "appeal": "open"
    },
  • "hasAppeal": true,
  • "proofSignalsProvided": true,
  • "verifiedContextBadgeEligible": true,
  • "featuredEligible": true
}

Update a post with moderation and AI authenticity checks

Update a post owned by the caller. Content or media changes require a new authorship disclosure. Conflicts or unavailable classification enter review; prohibited content remains blocked regardless of authorship.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
content
string
contentType
string
Enum: "text" "image" "video" "mixed"
mediaUrls
Array of strings <uri> [ items <uri > ]
topics
Array of strings
visibility
string
Enum: "public" "followers" "private"
isNews
boolean
aiLabel
string
Enum: "human" "assisted" "generated"

Required whenever content or media changes. Public responses use categorical labels only.

object (PostProofSignals)

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/posts/{id}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "content": "string",
  • "contentType": "text",
  • "mediaUrls": [
    • "http://example.com"
    ],
  • "topics": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "visibility": "public",
  • "isNews": true,
  • "aiLabel": "human",
  • "proofSignals": {
    • "captureMetadataHash": "string",
    • "editHistoryHash": "string",
    • "sourceAttestationUrl": "http://example.com"
    }
}

  • 200

  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "string",

  • "content": "string",

    • "http://example.com"

    • "ingestedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "ingestedBy": "string",
    • "ingestMethod": "admin_api"
    },
  • "clusterId": "string",
  • "authorship": {
    • "authorshipLabel": "Human-authored",

    • "classificationSource": "user_disclosure",

    },
  • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Get bookmark status for a post

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/posts/{id}/bookmark

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{ }

Bookmark a post

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
id
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
object

Moderation

Moderation workflows.

Flag content for moderation review

Flag content for review.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
contentId
required
string

Identifier of the content being flagged

contentType
required
string
Enum: "post" "comment" "user" "message"
reason
required
string
Enum: "spam" "harassment" "hate_speech" "violence" "adult_content" "misinformation" "copyright" "privacy" "other"

Moderation reason

additionalDetails
string <= 1000 characters

Additional details supporting the flag

urgency
string
Default: "medium"
Enum: "low" "medium" "high"

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/moderation/flag

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "contentId": "018b27d4-6e1e-7bd3-bb5a-98f24bb968c2",
  • "contentType": "post",
  • "reason": "spam",
  • "additionalDetails": "Repeated duplicate promotion across multiple threads."
}

Response samples

  • 202
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 429
Content type
application/json
{
  • "flagId": "018b27d4-83fd-7fff-b5e1-8e779ebf8eab",
  • "status": "queued"
}

Flag content for moderation review (v1 route)

Alias of /moderation/flag — legacy v1 route used by the function runtime.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
targetId
required
string <uuid>

Identifier of the content being flagged

reason
required
string
Enum: "spam" "harassment" "hate_speech" "violence" "adult_content" "misinformation" "copyright" "privacy" "other"

Moderation reason

notes
string <= 1000 characters

Additional details supporting the flag

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/moderation/flag-content

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "targetId": "cbca1126-180e-4334-9df8-cf82289d378b",
  • "reason": "spam",
  • "notes": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 202
  • 400
  • 401
  • 429
Content type
application/json
{
  • "flagId": "8872ed4e-aef3-4929-9fcf-2d71741365e7",
  • "status": "queued"
}

List the authenticated user's moderation appeals

Returns all appeals filed by the calling user, ordered by creation date descending.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
status
string
Enum: "pending" "approved" "rejected" "overridden"

Filter by appeal status

cursor
string

Pagination cursor

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/moderation/my-appeals

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 429
Content type
application/json
{
  • "items": [
    • {
      • "appealId": "string",
      • "caseId": "string",
      • "status": "string",
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "nextCursor": "string"
}

Submit a moderation appeal (v1 route)

Alias of /moderation/appeals — legacy v1 route used by the function runtime.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
caseId
required
string

Identifier of the moderation case being appealed

statement
required
string <= 2000 characters

User's statement explaining why the decision should be reversed

evidenceUrls
Array of strings <uri> <= 5 items [ items <uri > ]

Optional supporting evidence URLs

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/moderation/submit-appeal

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "caseId": "case_01HZPQ2B3C4D5E6F7G8H9JABCD",
  • "statement": "I believe this content was flagged in error because...",
  • "evidenceUrls": [
    • "http://example.com"
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 429
Content type
application/json
{
  • "appeal": {
    • "id": "apl_01HZPQ2B3C4D5E6F7G8H9JABCD",
    • "caseId": "case_01HZPQ2B3C4D5E6F7G8H9JABCD",
    • "status": "pending",
    • "createdAt": "2026-04-30T12:00:00Z"
    }
}

Cast a community vote on an appeal (v1 route)

Alias of /moderation/appeals/{appealId}/vote — accepts appealId in the request body.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
appealId
required
string

Appeal identifier

vote
required
string
Enum: "uphold" "deny"

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/moderation/vote-appeal

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "appealId": "string",
  • "vote": "uphold"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 429
Content type
application/json
{
  • "vote": {
    • "id": "vtx_01HZPQ2B3C4D5E6F7G8H9JABCD",
    • "appealId": "apl_01HZPQ2B3C4D5E6F7G8H9JABCD",
    • "vote": "uphold",
    • "recordedAt": "2026-04-30T12:05:00Z"
    }
}

Submit a moderation appeal

File an appeal against a moderation decision. Authenticated users with active accounts may appeal content removals. Daily appeal limits are tier-gated.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
caseId
required
string

Identifier of the moderation case being appealed

statement
required
string <= 2000 characters

User's statement explaining why the decision should be reversed

evidenceUrls
Array of strings <uri> <= 5 items [ items <uri > ]

Optional supporting evidence URLs

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/moderation/appeals

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "caseId": "case_01HZPQ2B3C4D5E6F7G8H9JABCD",
  • "statement": "I believe this was flagged in error because...",
  • "evidenceUrls": [
    • "https://example.com/evidence/screenshot.png"
    ]
}

Response samples

  • 201
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 429
Content type
application/json
{
  • "appeal": {
    • "id": "apl_01HZPQ2B3C4D5E6F7G8H9JABCD",
    • "caseId": "case_01HZPQ2B3C4D5E6F7G8H9JABCD",
    • "status": "pending",
    • "createdAt": "2026-04-30T12:00:00Z"
    }
}

Moderator review decision on an appeal

Submit a moderator review decision for an appealed content case. Requires moderator privileges.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
appealId
required
string

Appeal identifier

Request Body schema: application/json
required
decision
required
string
Enum: "uphold" "overturn"
rationale
string

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/moderation/appeals/{appealId}/review

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "decision": "uphold",
  • "rationale": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 429
Content type
application/json
{ }

Cast a community vote on an appeal

Authenticated community members may cast a weighted vote (uphold or deny) on an open appeal. Duplicate votes are rejected. Vote eligibility and quorum rules are enforced server-side.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
appealId
required
string

Appeal identifier

Request Body schema: application/json
required
vote
required
string
Enum: "uphold" "deny"

uphold keeps content removed; deny requests restoration

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/moderation/appeals/{appealId}/vote

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
Example
{
  • "vote": "uphold"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 404
  • 429
Content type
application/json
{
  • "vote": {
    • "id": "vtx_01HZPQ2B3C4D5E6F7G8H9JABCD",
    • "appealId": "apl_01HZPQ2B3C4D5E6F7G8H9JABCD",
    • "vote": "uphold",
    • "recordedAt": "2026-04-30T12:05:00Z"
    }
}

Admin

Lythaus admin moderation and safety operations.

List flagged content queue

Returns grouped flagged content for admin triage.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
status
string
Enum: "open" "resolved" "all"

Filter by queue status

cursor
string

Cursor for pagination

limit
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]

Number of items to return (1-100)

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/_admin/flags

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "items": [
    • {
      • "content": {
        • "contentId": "string",
        • "type": "post",
        • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
        • "preview": "string"
        },
      • "author": {
        • "authorId": "string",
        • "displayName": "string",
        • "handle": "string"
        },
      • "flags": {
        • "flagId": "string",
        • "flagCount": 0,
        • "reasonCategories": [
          • "string"
          ],
        • "lastFlaggedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
        },
      • "state": "PUBLISHED",
      • "moderation": {
        • "lastDecisionAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
        • "configVersionUsed": 0,
        • "reasonCodes": [
          • "string"
          ]
        },
      • "status": "OPEN"
      }
    ],
  • "nextCursor": "string",
  • "count": 0
}

    },

        }
      ],

        • "note": "string"
        }
      ],

      • "status": "PENDING"
      }
    }
}

    },

    },
  • "appeal": {
    • "appealId": "string",
    • "contentId": "string",
    • "authorId": "string",
    • "submittedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",

      • "string"

    • "decision": "BLOCKED",
    • "decidedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"

Approve an appeal

Approves an appeal and restores content to PUBLISHED. Overrides existing outcomes.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
appealId
required
string

Appeal identifier

Request Body schema: application/json
required
reasonCode
required
string
note
string

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/_admin/appeals/{appealId}/approve

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "reasonCode": "string",
  • "note": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "appealId": "string",
  • "status": "PENDING",
  • "contentId": "string",
  • "contentStatus": "PUBLISHED"
}

Reject an appeal

Rejects an appeal and keeps content BLOCKED. Overrides existing outcomes.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
appealId
required
string

Appeal identifier

Request Body schema: application/json
required
reasonCode
required
string
note
string

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/_admin/appeals/{appealId}/reject

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "reasonCode": "string",
  • "note": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "appealId": "string",
  • "status": "PENDING",
  • "contentId": "string",
  • "contentStatus": "PUBLISHED"
}

Override an appeal

Moderator override for appeal outcomes. Idempotent per appeal.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
appealId
required
string

Appeal identifier

header Parameters
Idempotency-Key
string

Idempotency key for safe retries

Request Body schema: application/json
required
decision
required
string (AdminAppealFinalDecision)
Enum: "allow" "block"
reasonCode
required
string
Enum: "policy_exception" "false_positive" "safety_risk" "other"
reasonNote
string <= 500 characters

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/_admin/appeals/{appealId}/override

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "decision": "allow",
  • "reasonCode": "policy_exception",
  • "reasonNote": "string"
}

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 409
Content type
application/json
{
  • "appealId": "string",
  • "status": "overridden",
  • "finalDecision": "allow"
}

Returns recent admin audit entries.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
limit
integer [ 1 .. 200 ]

Number of entries to return (1-200)

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/_admin/audit

  • 401
  • 403

      • "action": "string",
      • "targetType": "string",

      • "reasonCode": "string",
      • "note": "string",
      • "before": { },
      • "after": { },
      • "correlationId": "string",
      • "metadata": { }
      }
    ],
  • "count": 0,
  • "nextCursor": "string"
}

Returns opaque invite identifiers and usage metadata. Plaintext codes are never listed.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
createdBy
string

Filter by creator id

unused
boolean

Filter for unused invites only

cursor
string

Cursor for pagination

limit
integer [ 1 .. 200 ]

Number of items to return (1-200)

      • "maxUses": 0,
      • "usageCount": 0,

      • "status": "ACTIVE",

      • "inviteCode": "string"
      }
    ],

}

integer
maxUses
integer

string

Set user subscription tier

Update the subscription tier of a specific user. Requires active admin privileges.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
path Parameters
userId
required
string

User identifier

Request Body schema: application/json
required
tier
required
string
Enum: "free" "premium" "black"
reason
required
string [ 5 .. 500 ] characters
expiresAt
string <date-time>

Required for Premium and Black Alpha grants; no more than 90 days ahead.

reviewAt
string <date-time>

Required for Premium and Black Alpha grants; on or before expiresAt.

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/admin/users/{userId}/tier

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "tier": "free",
  • "reason": "string",
  • "expiresAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "reviewAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 429
Content type
application/json
{
  • "userId": "string",
  • "status": "ACTIVE"
}

Privacy

User data portability and account deletion (GDPR/CCPA).

Export personal data (GDPR Article 20)

Returns a structured copy of all personal data held for the authenticated user. Export cooldown periods are tier-gated. The X-Export-ID response header contains the export identifier for tracking.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/user/export

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 429
Content type
application/json
{
  • "metadata": {
    • "exportId": "exp_1714478400000_abc123",
    • "exportedAt": "2026-04-30T12:00:00Z",
    • "exportedBy": "usr_01HZPQ2B3C4D5E6F7G8H9JABCD",
    • "dataVersion": "1.0"
    },
  • "userProfile": {
    • "displayName": "Alice Example"
    },
  • "content": {
    • "posts": [ ],
    • "comments": [ ]
    },
  • "interactions": {
    • "likes": [ ],
    • "flags": [ ]
    },
  • "moderation": {
    • "appeals": [ ],
    • "votes": [ ]
    },
  • "reputation": {
    • "ledger": [ ]
    },
  • "privacy": {
    • "previousExports": [ ],
    • "dataRequests": [ ]
    }
}

Delete own account (GDPR Article 17)

Permanently deletes the authenticated user's account and anonymises all authored content. Requires the X-Confirm-Delete: true header to guard against accidental invocations. This action is irreversible.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
header Parameters
X-Confirm-Delete
required
string
Value: "true"

Must be set to "true" to confirm deletion

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/user/delete

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 429
Content type
application/json
{
  • "message": "Account deletion completed",
  • "userId": "usr_01HZPQ2B3C4D5E6F7G8H9JABCD",
  • "deletedAt": "2026-04-30T12:00:00Z",
  • "alreadyDeleted": false
}

Privacy Admin

Data Subject Request and legal hold administration.

Enqueue a Data Subject Request export

Queues an export job for a user's data as part of GDPR/CCPA compliance. Returns immediately with job tracking info.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
userId
required
string
note
string

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/_admin/dsr/export

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "userId": "018b27d4-5b3b-73e3-bf77-bf7bb9530f21",
  • "note": "User requested a copy of their account data."
}

Response samples

  • 202
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "dsr_01HZPQ2B3C4D5E6F7G8H9JABCD",
  • "status": "queued",
  • "type": "export"
}

Enqueue a Data Subject Request delete

Queues a deletion job for a user's data as part of GDPR/CCPA right-to-erasure compliance. Returns immediately with job tracking info.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
userId
required
string
note
string

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/_admin/dsr/delete

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "userId": "string",
  • "note": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 202
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "string",
  • "status": "queued",
  • "type": "export",
  • "exportBlobPath": "string",
  • "attemptedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

Place a legal hold

Places a legal hold on a user's data, preventing deletion until the hold is cleared. Used for litigation or regulatory preservation.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
scope
required
string
Enum: "user" "post" "case"
scopeId
required
string
reason
required
string

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

application/json

Clear an existing legal hold

Removes a previously placed legal hold, allowing normal data lifecycle operations (including deletion) to resume.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
required
string

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/admin/legal-hold/clear

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": "string"
}

Reputation

Reputation summaries and user-visible ledger entries.

Get my reputation summary

Returns the authenticated user's reputation level, band, pillar scores, and eligibility statuses. Raw formulas and internal risk scores are not returned.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/reputation/me

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "userId": "string",
  • "reputationLevel": 5,
  • "reputationStatus": "standard",
  • "reputationBand": "new",
  • "humanContributionScore": 0,
  • "contentQualityScore": 0,
  • "behaviourTrustScore": 0,
  • "interactionQualityScore": 0,
  • "verificationStrengthScore": 0,
  • "communityTrustScore": 0,
  • "publicFeedEligibilityStatus": "eligible",
  • "rewardEligibilityStatus": "eligible",
  • "lastCalculatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "version": 0
}

Get my reputation ledger

Returns user-visible reputation events. Internal reason codes, raw deltas, Hive scores, and anti-abuse scores are excluded.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
filter
string
Default: "all"
Enum: "all" "positive" "neutral" "negative" "appeal" "expired"
cursor
string
Example: cursor=eyJsYXN0SWQiOiIwMThiMjdkNC01YjNiLTczZTMtYmY3Ny1iZjdiYjk1MzBmMjEiLCJ0cyI6MTcxNDQ3ODQwMH0

Opaque pagination cursor returned in the previous response's meta.nextCursor

limit
integer [ 1 .. 50 ]
Default: 25
Example: limit=25

Maximum number of items to return per page

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/reputation/me/ledger

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "entries": [
    • {
      • "id": "string",
      • "userId": "string",
      • "eventType": "string",
      • "eventCategory": "positive",
      • "pillar": "string",
      • "publicLabel": "string",
      • "impactBand": "string",
      • "relatedContentId": "string",
      • "relatedModerationDecisionId": "string",
      • "visibility": "user",
      • "appealable": true,
      • "appealStatus": "pending",
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "decaysAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "status": "active"
      }
    ],
  • "nextCursor": "string"
}

Get public reputation view

path Parameters
id
required
string

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/reputation/users/{id}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 404
Content type
application/json
{
  • "userId": "string",
  • "reputationLevel": 5,
  • "reputationStatus": "standard",
  • "reputationBand": "string",
  • "levelName": "string"
}

Reactions

Structured content reactions.

Submit a structured reaction

Records a structured reaction and applies anti-gaming controls before deciding whether it contributes to reputation.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
targetContentId
required
string
targetUserId
required
string
reactionType
required
string
Enum: "helpful" "well_sourced" "thoughtful" "agree" "disagree" "misleading" "low_effort" "report"

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/reactions

}

  • 400
  • 401
Content type
application/json

  • "reactionType": "string",
  • "includedInReputation": true,
  • "antiGamingStatus": "clear",
  • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
}

path Parameters
id
required
string

  • "redemptionStatus": "active",
  • "fraudRiskStatus": "string",
  • "offers": [
    • {

      • "rewardLevel": 1,
      • "title": "string",
      • "description": "string",
      • "partnerName": "string",

    ],

      • "rewardTitle": "string",
      • "redeemedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "status": "redeemed"
      }
    ],

}

CustomFeeds

List custom feeds for the current user

List custom feed definitions owned by the authenticated user.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
query Parameters
cursor
string
Example: cursor=eyJsYXN0SWQiOiIwMThiMjdkNC01YjNiLTczZTMtYmY3Ny1iZjdiYjk1MzBmMjEiLCJ0cyI6MTcxNDQ3ODQwMH0

Opaque pagination cursor returned in the previous response's meta.nextCursor

limit
integer [ 1 .. 50 ]
Default: 25
Example: limit=25

Maximum number of items to return per page

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/custom-feeds

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
Content type
application/json
{
  • "items": [
    • {
      • "id": "string",
      • "ownerId": "string",
      • "name": "string",
      • "contentType": "text",
      • "sorting": "hot",
      • "includeKeywords": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "excludeKeywords": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "includeAccounts": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "excludeAccounts": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "isHome": true,
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "nextCursor": "string"
}

Create a new custom feed

Create a custom feed definition. The service enforces tier limits: Free users may create 1 custom feed, Premium users 2, Black users 3, and Admin users 20.

Authorizations:
bearerAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
name
required
string
contentType
required
string
Enum: "text" "image" "video" "mixed"
sorting
required
string
Enum: "hot" "new" "relevant" "following" "local"
includeKeywords
Array of strings
excludeKeywords
Array of strings
includeAccounts
Array of strings
excludeAccounts
Array of strings
isHome
boolean

Responses

Lythaus MVP API gateway

https://api.lythaus.co/api/custom-feeds

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "name": "string",
  • "contentType": "text",
  • "sorting": "hot",
  • "includeKeywords": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "excludeKeywords": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "includeAccounts": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "excludeAccounts": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "isHome": true
}

  • 400
  • 401
  • 403

        • "http://example.com"
        ],
      • "topics": [
        • "string"
        ],
      • "visibility": "public",
      • "isNews": true,
      • "source": {
        • "type": "journalist",
        • "name": "string",
        • "url": "http://example.com",
        • "feedUrl": "http://example.com",
        • "externalId": "string",
        • "publishedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
        • "ingestedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
        • "ingestedBy": "string",
        • "ingestMethod": "admin_api"
        },
      • "clusterId": "string",
      • "authorship": {
        • "authorshipLabel": "Human-authored",
        • "declaredAuthorship": "human",
        • "classificationSource": "user_disclosure",
        • "classificationState": "confirmed",
        • "reviewState": "not_required",
        • "appealState": "none",
        • "labelVersion": "string",
        • "classifiedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
        • "reviewedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
        },
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
      • "updatedAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",

      • "authorRole": "journalist",

      • "commentCount": 0,
      • "bookmarkCount": 0,

        • {

          • "text": "string",

          }

        ],

    • "dailyPosts": 0,
